title: buildah: use the same logic for XDG_RUNTIME_DIR as podman
body:
if XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is not set, try in the order:

- /var/run/user/$UID/run
- $HOME/rundir

also set the XDG_RUNTIME_DIR so that the OCI runtime will
use the same settings.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: Red Hat CI isn't happy.  I think, but don't know that it's a flake.
tested and it works on centos7
